'''√m-y-sh''' ('''kamayash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quight|quight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quight|quight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √m-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kamayash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thimayash || jimayash || shimayash || kimayash
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthumayash || jujumayash || shushumayash || kukumayash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thumayash || jumayash || shumayash || kumayash
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thumayash || jumayash || shumayash || kumayash
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || themayash || jemayash || shemayash || kemayash
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothomayash || jojomayash || shoshomayash || kokomayash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thomayash || jomayash || shomayash || komayash
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thomayash || jomayash || shomayash || komayash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mayash || mayash || mayash || mayash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || mayash || mayash || mayash || mayash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || mayash || mayash || mayash || mayash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || mayash || mayash || mayash || mayash
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæmayash || jæmayash || shæmayash || kæmayash
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathamayash || jajamayash || shashamayash || kakamayash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thamayash || jamayash || shamayash || kamayash
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thamayash || jamayash || shamayash || kamayash
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shamayash
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshamayash
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishamayash
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shamayashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshamayashnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishamayashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shamayashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshamayashnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishamayashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shamayashro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshamayashnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishamayashro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shamayashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshamayashnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishamayashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shamayashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshamayashnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishamayashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shamayashng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshamayashnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishamayashng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shamayashya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshamayashnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishamayashya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shamayashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshamayashnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishamayashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shamayashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshamayashnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishamayashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shamayashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamayashnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamayashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shamayashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshamayashnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamayashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shamayashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshamayashnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishamayashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shamayashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamayashnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamayashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shamayashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshamayashnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamayashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shamayashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshamayashnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishamayashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shamayashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshamayashnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishamayashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shamayashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshamayashnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamayashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shamayashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshamayashnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishamayashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shamayashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshamayashnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishamayashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shamayashmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamayashnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamayashmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
